creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Diffs updated to reflect current ports tree.
Name of patch-files will not change and I will update the patches if needed again.

http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/Mk_bsd.port.mk/PR_bsd.svn.mk.diff

All 80+ port fixes:
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/Mk_bsd.port.mk/PR_bsd.svn.mk_all_ports.diff


Do you think we can do the test together with a new exp-run for apache22?
I really wont to have this before the change to apache22 as default ;)
